name: get_oracle_feature_specs
short_description: Get the Oracle Feature Specifications for the current part.
full_help:
get_oracle_feature_specs

Description: 
Get the Oracle Feature Specifications for the current part.

Syntax: 
get_oracle_feature_specs  [-regexp] [-nocase] [-filter <arg>]
                          [-of_objects <args>] [-part <arg>] [-quiet]
                          [-verbose] [<patterns>]

Returns: 
oracle_feature_spec

Usage: 
  Name           Description
  --------------------------
  [-regexp]      Patterns are full regular expressions
  [-nocase]      Perform case-insensitive matching. (valid only when -regexp 
                 specified)
  [-filter]      Filter list with expression
  [-of_objects]  Get the oracle_feature_spec of these part.
  [-part]        Target part
  [-quiet]       Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]     Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<patterns>]   Match oracle_feature_spec against patterns
                 Default: *

Categories: 
Device, Object, Internal

arguments.description: Perform case-insensitive matching. (valid only when -regexp specified)
Get the oracle_feature_spec of these part.
Suspend message limits during command execution
